entity.description: Karihome Goat Milk Growing Up Formula for children over 12 months

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: New Zealand

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
4.8g measuring scoop enclosed. Always prepare the feed immediately prior to feeding.
1 Wash cup and utensils in hot soapy water or detergent. Rinse well.
2. Boil water and let it cool till lukewarm.
3. Measure the volume of cooled boiled water into a clean cup, bottle or measuring jug.
4. Add the required number of level scoop of powder. Fill the scoop lightly and level with a knife.
5. Always add one scoop level of powder to reach 30ml of water.
6. Stir briskly to dissolve the powder.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Store unopened can in a cool dry place
• After opening, keep airtight and continue to store in a cool dry place
•Use contents within 4 weeks
• Use by date under bottom of can.

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Goat Whole Milk , Lactose (From Milk), Goat milk powders,Vegetable Oil Blend (Canola Oil, High Oleic Sunflower Oil, Sunflower Oil, Sunflower Lecithin, Mixed Tocopherols), Goat Milk Powders, Inulin,  Marine Fish Oil Powder, (Source of DHA), Minerals (Dicalcium phosphate, Calcium carbonate, Ferrous sulphate,   Potassium Iodide, Zinc Sulphate, Ferric pyrophosphate, Sodium Selenite) Oligofructose, Choline bitartrate.  Vitamins (Ascorbic Acid, Dl-α-Tocopheryl Acetate, Nicotinamide, Retinyl Acetate, Cholecalciferol, Calcium D-pantothenate, Cyanocobalamin, Phytonadione, Thiamine Hydrochloride, Pyridoxine hydrochloride, Riboflavin,  Folic Acid) Calcium Hydroxide, Probiotic cultures (Bifidobacterium lactis Bi-07 and Lactobacillus acidpphilus NCFM'tm) Taurine. Contains Milk, Soy And Fish Products

displayMetadata.name: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Karihome Goat Milk Growing Up Formula for children over 12 months

categoryDataMapping.name: Free Mayer Foldable Multi-Functional Ceramic Cooker with Grill

product.description: With over 100 years of experience in pediatric nutrition, Mead Johnson Nutrition has scientifically formulated Enfagrow Pro A+ Stage 3 with a unique blend of nutrients that are important for overall mental and physical development.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Milk Fat Globule Membrane (MFGM) is a natural source of phospholipids and sphingomyelin
• Formulated with DHA Plus to help meet recommended daily DHA intake*. DHA is an important building blocks for brain and eye development
• Choline helps support overall mental functioning
• With 2’-FL. Complemented with Iron and Zinc that help support your child’s natural defenses.
• Prebiotic (FOS) promotes the growth of good Bifidus bacteria to help maintain a healthy digestive system
• No added sucrose
*FAO/WHO recommends daily dietary DHA intake of 10-12mg/kg body weight for children 12-24 months or 100-150mg DHA+EPA for children 2 years old and above. Reference: FAO 2010. Fats and fatty acids in human nutrition. Report of an expert consultation. FAO Food and Nutrition Paper no. 91. FAO:Rome

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: Thailand

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value: To prepare a single serving, add 3 level scoops (approximately 30g) of Enfagrow Pro A+ Stage 3 powder into 150ml of cooled boiled water to make a 170ml beverage. Stir or shake until the powder is fully dissolved.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Store in a cool and dry place, before and after opening
• After opening, keep it tightly covered and use contents within 1 month
• Do not freeze powder and avoid excessive heat

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value:
Lactose (Cow'S Milk), Vegetable Oils (Palm Olein Oil, Coconut Oil, Soybean Oil And Sunflower Oil), Skim Milk Powder (Cow'S Milk), Whey Protein Concentrates^ (Cow'S Milk), Galactooligosaccharides (Cow'S Milk), Polydextrose, Minerals (Potassium Chloride, Sodium Citrate, Tricalcium Phosphate, Calcium Carbonate, Magnesium Phosphate, Potassium Hydroxide, Potassium Citrate, Ferrous Sulfate, Zinc Sulfate, Copper Sulfate, Manganese Sulfate, Sodium Iodide And Sodium Selenite), Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin), Single Cell Oils* As Sources Of Arachidonic Acid (Ara) And Docosahexaenoic Acid (Dha), Vitamins (Ascorbic Acid, Choline Chloride, Alpha-Tocopheryl Acetate, Retinyl Palmitate, Niacinamide, Phytonadione, Calcium Pantothenate, Cholecalciferol, Cyanocobalamin, Riboflavin, Thiamin Hydrochloride, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride, Folic Acid And Biotin), Corn Syrup Solids, 2'-Fucosyllactose, Inositol, Taurine, L-Carnitine And Antioxidant (Ascorbyl Palmitate).
^Source Of Milk Fat Globule Membrane (Mfgm).
*Single Cell Oils From Mortierella Alpina And Schizochytrium Sp.
• Contains Ingredients Derived From Milk And Soy.

displayMetadata.name: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: With over 100 years of experience in pediatric nutrition, Mead Johnson Nutrition has scientifically formulated Enfagrow Pro A+ Stage 3 with a unique blend of nutrients that are important for overall mental and physical development.

product.name: Nestle Nan Supremepro H.A Milk Formula - Stage 3

offers.description: Buy 1 Nestle Nan Supremepro H.A Milk Formula - Stage 3 @ $331.65

product.description:
Formulated for immunity support, NAN OPTIPRO 3 provides your baby with all the nutrients essential for  optimal growth and development.  
Sciences for their amazing futures - Backed by over 155 years of scientific leadership, research and innovative development in Nestle, we are passionate about providing the best for children, and committed to manufacturing quality nutrition with our highest Swiss standards and perfection. We care for the planet, for their amazing futures.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Premium Growing Up milk for toddlers 12 months and older.
• Upgraded & formulated for Immunity Support with exclusive 5-MO Complex(2'-FL, DFL, LNT, 3'-SL,6'-SL), Iron, Zinc and Vitamins
• Contains OPTIPRO®, an exclusive optimized protein blend that provides the right amount of quality proteins
• Complemented with Bifidus BL, a patented active probiotics that helps digestion and maintain a healthy digestive system
• Contains DHA & ARA for brain and eye development.
• No added Sucrose.

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: Singapore

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. Wash your hands before preparing baby's formula.
2. Wash bottle, teat and cap thoroughly until no milk remains.
3. Boil for five minutes. Leave covered until use.
4. Boil drinking water for five minutes and allow to cool to around 45°C.
5. Consult feeding table, pour exact amount of luke-warm water.
6. Only use scoop from this container and level using inner rim.
7. Consult feeding table, add exact number of scoops for age of baby.
8. After use, store the spoon on suspension inside the can as shown.
9. Cap bottle and shake well until powder is fully dissolved.
10. Store in a cool dry place before and after opening. Close tin tightly after each use.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Store in a cool dry place before and after opening
• Close tin tightly after each use

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS

Oil, ARA from Mortierella Alpina, Lacto-N-tetraose (LNT), Sodium salts of 3'-Sialyllactose (3'-SL), Ferrous Sulphate, Difucosyllactose (DFL), 6'-Sialyllactose (6'-SL), Zinc Sulfate, Vitamin E, Vitamin B3, Tocopherols (Contains Soya), Citric Acid, Bifidobacterium Lactis, , Vitamin B5, Vitamin C, Copper Sulfate, Vitamin A,Vitamin B1, Vitamin B6, Vitamin B2, Vitamin E, Manganese Sulfate, Folic Acid, Potassium Iodide, Vitamin K1, Sodium Selenate,  Biotin, Vitamin D3, Vitamin B12.

displayMetadata.name: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
Formulated for immunity support, NAN® OPTIPRO® 3 provides your baby with all the nutrients essential for  optimal growth and development.  
Sciences for their amazing futures - Backed by over 155 years of scientific leadership, research and innovative development in Nestlé, we are passionate about providing the best for children, and committed to manufacturing quality nutrition with our highest Swiss standards and perfection. We care for the planet, for their amazing futures.

metaData.Ingredients: Skimmed Cow’s Milk, Lactose (Cow’s Milk), Whey Powder, Sunflower Oil, Soybean Oil, Coconut Oil, Calcium Citrate, Sodium Citrate, Potassium Phosphate, Soya Lecithin, Maltodextrin,  2-fucosyllactose (2’-FL) (Oligosaccharide),  Monoglycerides,  Vitamin C,  DHA from Schizochytrium sp. Oil, ARA from Mortierella Alpina, Lacto-N-tetraose (LNT), Sodium salts of 3'-Sialyllactose (3'-SL), Ferrous Sulphate, Difucosyllactose (DFL), 6'-Sialyllactose (6'-SL), Zinc Sulfate, Vitamin E, Vitamin B3, Tocopherols (Contains Soya), Citric Acid, Bifidobacterium Lactis, , Vitamin B5, Vitamin C, Copper Sulfate, Vitamin A,Vitamin B1, Vitamin B6, Vitamin B2, Vitamin E, Manganese Sulfate, Folic Acid, Potassium Iodide, Vitamin K1, Sodium Selenate,  Biotin, Vitamin D3, Vitamin B12.
metaData.Key Information:
• Premium Growing Up milk for toddlers 12 months and older.
• Upgraded & formulated for Immunity Support with exclusive 5-MO Complex(2'-FL, DFL, LNT, 3'-SL,6'-SL), Iron, Zinc and Vitamins
• Contains OPTIPRO®, an exclusive optimized protein blend that provides the right amount of quality proteins
• Complemented with Bifidus BL, a patented active probiotics that helps digestion and maintain a healthy digestive system
• Contains DHA & ARA for brain and eye development.
• No added Sucrose.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Wash your hands before preparing baby's formula.
2. Wash bottle, teat and cap thoroughly until no milk remains.
3. Boil for five minutes. Leave covered until use.
4. Boil drinking water for five minutes and allow to cool to around 45°C.
5. Consult feeding table, pour exact amount of luke-warm water.
6. Only use scoop from this container and level using inner rim.
7. Consult feeding table, add exact number of scoops for age of baby.
8. After use, store the spoon on suspension inside the can as shown.
9. Cap bottle and shake well until powder is fully dissolved.
10. Store in a cool dry place before and after opening. Close tin tightly after each use.
metaData.SAP Product Name: NESTLE NAN OPTIPRO STAGE 3 GROWING UP MILK 2FL 850G
metaData.Storage Information:
• Store in a cool dry place before and after opening
• Close tin tightly after each use
